The '''Koboth Union''' was an union of the [[Kobok/Legends|Kobok]] [[Species/Legends|species]] worlds in the fringe of the [[Tingel Arm/Legends|Tingel Arm]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. An insular civilization. it was formed [[Standard century/Legends|centuries]] before the rise of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. It was responsible for all of the decisions made by the Kobok, notably the trade agreements made between the nearby [[Trianii/Legends|Trianni]] colonies and the [[Hiitian/Legends|Hitt]] clan aeries.
